nodes.name: When Executed by WF-001
nodes.notes: Accept all data (passthrough). inputSource MUST be lowercase 'passthrough'; n8n silently ignores camelCase 'passThrough' on import and falls back to defined-fields mode, dropping the caller's payload (and any binary).

nodes.name: Build Transaction
nodes.notes: Generates the §234 all-or-nothing transaction. UUID columns are emitted via uid()/fk(), NOT q(): q() coerces null/undefined to '' and every call site quoted the result, so an absent id produced id='' and Postgres raised: invalid input syntax for type uuid: "". SW-013's node returns {chunkId, vector, dimensions} with NO id, so em.id was ALWAYS undefined and the embeddings INSERT always failed — after metadata, knowledge_units, evidence, citations and retrieval_chunks had all inserted (those DO mint id: uuidV4() upstream). uid() emits the bare token DEFAULT for an absent PK so uuid_generate_v4() fires; NULL would NOT work, because a PRIMARY KEY is implicitly NOT NULL. fk() throws on an absent foreign key rather than silently minting an unrelated UUID.

nodes.name: Execute Transaction
nodes.notes: Runs BEGIN..COMMIT as ONE query (§234). On error the txn rolls back and the node fails -> WF-001 IF routes to Repository/FAILED. CRIE Postgres credential.
